Saw 3D (2010)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $45,710,178Details
International Box Office $88,025,106
Worldwide Box Office $133,735,284
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,753,342
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,406,563
Total $15,159,905
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,230,123 (53.0% of total gross)
Legs:1.89 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,000,000 (worldwide box office is 7.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,808 opening theaters/2,808 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $69,289,447

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 29th, 2010 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: March 3rd, 2011 (Wide), released as Saw VII (New Zealand)
Video Release: January 25th, 2011 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sequences of grisly bloody violence and torture, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2127 (Cert #46227), 6/30/2010)
Running Time: 91 minutes
Franchise: Saw
Cast, crew, or production detail: Gratuitous Cameos
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Serial Killer, Torture Porn
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Twisted Pictures, Burg-Knoules, Hoffman
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
